data.body: VALIDATION COMPLETE: 6 subagents reviewed all 8 done stories — all COMPLETE; addressed every valid concern in commit 9ca80f19 (ffc4 cap airtight, WS-C progress markers + bg-failure record, WS-B linter type/agent-field checks, WS-I Mermaid escaping + CLI/MCP render tests, WS-J2 OTLP config, WS-J3 AST for/while/match, gate findings, docs). Now continuing epic: WS-D (agentic capabilities). Starting D2: hardened git-ref filesystem snapshot (snapshot.py: rev-parse ^{commit} -> git archive -> hardened tar extract via data_filter, size guard, cache-by-SHA under .rebar/run_snapshots, read-only; WS-C3 TTL sweep GCs).
